creator: gshapiro@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

FreeBSD is now using sendmail 8.11.1 and a lot of changes/fixes have 
occurred since 8.9.3.  If this problem still exists, please send a message 
to sendmail-bugs@sendmail.org so they can look into it.  Please include 
mail logs (from /var/log/maillog) showing the duplicate delivery.
